series.title: Madagascar Hörspiel

albums.title: Flucht durch Europa (Das Original-Hörspiel zum Kinofilm)

series.curator_notes: This artist contains only movie audiobooks ('Das Original-Hörspiel zum Kinofilm') rather than an episodic Hörspiel series. All releases are chapter-by-chapter retellings of the Madagascar films with 8-23 short tracks (~3 min each). For episodic Madagascar content, see 'Die Pinguine aus Madagascar' spinoff series (curated separately).

review.notes: Auto-approved: no gaps or duplicates found.

verification.concerns:
Significant issue: All 4 albums were incorrectly marked for INCLUSION. The first AI proposed overrides from exclude→include for all 4 albums, but this is wrong. 

These are movie audiobooks ("Das Original-Hörspiel zum Kinofilm"), not episodic series content. The track naming pattern ("Teil 1", "Teil 2", etc.) indicates chapter divisions within a full film retelling, not sequential episodes of a series. For a DACH children's audio player catalog, these full movie adaptations are not appropriate - they retell entire films (each 90+ minutes broken into ~18-23 chapters), which is fundamentally different from episodic series content.

The correct decision is to KEEP ALL 4 ALBUMS EXCLUDED. The overrides should be rejected, not approved. The first AI's review was incorrect - these are valid exclusions (movie audiobooks, not episodic series).

The series currently has 0 included albums, which appears to mean there is no actual episodic Madagascar audio series in Spotify's database. That's fine - the exclusion decision is correct.
